title: Imperial Spaceport
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Image}}

The '''Imperial Spaceport''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] occupied city on [[Kile II]], and part of the [[Imperial Enclave]] situated on the planet. The spaceport was surrounded by a [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] defense.

The spaceport was completely destroyed during [[Assault on Kile II|bombing runs]] performed by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]
